CustomField.description: Widget targeting filter: Geographic location (city or region). Leave blank to show to alumni in any location. When populated, only alumni whose Geo_Locations__c field contains one of the selected values will see this widget. Useful for Tommie Tailgate city-specific messaging and regional event promotion. References the Geo_Locations global picklist. Source: 2026_PortalUpdates-Widget_Filters.csv
CustomField.label: Filter: Geo Location
